title: polygala amara subsp. austriaca
intro: Polygala amara subsp. austriaca, also known as Alpine Milkwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the milkwort family Polygalaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpine Milkwort include its potential to support respiratory health, improve sleep quality, and lower blood pressure. Alpine Milkwort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract for use in herbal remedies.
